description: The Goods Receipt Note (GRN) raised by Receiving when materials are physically received and QC-passed against a PO and its originating requisition. It is the receipt event that accrues the GR/IR liability, relieves the commitment to actual, and forces a three-way match downstream. One PO can produce several GRNs across partial deliveries; the spares/services path closes the requisition with no GRN (forcing a two-way match instead).

fields.name: grnNumber
fields.label: GRN No.
fields.validation: system pattern; unique; immutable once raised
fields.purpose: The stable receipt key that links the requisition and PO to the match and GR/IR records; the human-readable handle a three-way match and an auditor trace receipt against.

fields.name: poReference
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.validation: resolves to an issued/acknowledged PO; not null
fields.purpose: Anchors the receipt to the order it fulfils; GRN existence on a PO line is the single fact that selects THREE_WAY match downstream (axiom A8).

fields.name: requisitionReference
fields.label: Requisition
fields.validation: resolves to the originating requisition of the PO; not null
fields.purpose: Keeps the receipt traceable to the originating demand (the requisition spine, axiom A1); QC and Receiving verify against the requisition, not the PO, which stays procurement-only.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.purpose: Identifies who delivered, so the receipt feeds the supplier delivery score (OTD, two-factor OTIF) and the four-factor perfect-order metric (axiom A14).

fields.name: receivedLines
fields.label: Received Lines
fields.validation: array of {poLineId, acceptedQty >= 0, rejectedQty >= 0}; poLineId resolves to a line of poReference; acceptedQty + rejectedQty <= delivered quantity for the line
fields.purpose: The per-line accepted/rejected split that the three-way match compares quantity against (match uses GRN accepted quantity, not ordered quantity); rejected quantity seeds the NCR/return path.

fields.name: receivedQty
fields.label: Total Received Quantity
fields.validation: >= 0; equals sum of acceptedQty + rejectedQty over receivedLines
fields.purpose: The header roll-up of quantity received on this GRN; feeds the per-item delivered-quantity aggregation that derives delivery status (delivered/partial/overdue/upcoming).

fields.name: receiptDate
fields.label: GRN Date
fields.validation: valid date; tenant timezone; display DD-MMM-YYYY
fields.purpose: The date receipt is recognised; the on-time check compares it to the PO committed delivery date for OTD and two-factor OTIF, and it dates the GR/IR accrual.

fields.name: receivingStore
fields.label: Receiving Store
fields.validation: a configured warehouse; required on the materials path
fields.purpose: Where the goods physically land; drives inventory location and the store-to-QC handoff on the materials path.

fields.name: coaAttached
fields.label: COA Received
fields.validation: must be true before inspection or GRN may proceed on the materials path (HARD BLOCK)
fields.purpose: The hard gate: no Certificate of Analysis on file means no inspection and no GRN; the buyer chases the supplier in a loop until it is on file (ISO 8.4.3(b)/8.6).

fields.name: erpGrNumber
fields.label: ERP GR Number
fields.validation: free text; GR number from the ERP boundary
fields.purpose: Cross-references the receipt to the GR posted in the external ERP, so the prototype receipt reconciles with the system of record.

fields.name: qcDecision
fields.label: QC Decision
fields.mandatoryCondition: materials path (category resolves to RM/PM); not required on the spares/services path
fields.validation: approve required before GRN raise on the materials path; reject raises an NCR instead of a GRN
fields.purpose: The QC gate carried onto the GRN: only an approved lot becomes a GRN; a rejected lot diverts to NCR/quarantine and never produces this receipt (axiom A11 entry).

fields.name: raisedBy
fields.label: Raised By
fields.validation: from authenticated profile; read-only; a Receiving-role user
fields.purpose: Records the receiver for traceability and for SoD on the invoice approval (the receiver of the goods may not approve the matching invoice, axiom A6).

fields.name: grnDate
fields.label: Raised At
fields.purpose: The system timestamp of the receipt event; orders the GR/IR accrual and commitment relief and anchors the audit/SSE entry (axiom A13).

invariants: A1 receipt traces to the immutable requisition identifier
A8 GRN existence selects THREE_WAY match
A11 QC gate / no COA hard block precedes GRN
A13 audit + SSE on every receipt
A14 receipt feeds OTD/two-factor OTIF + four-factor perfect-order
GR/IR accrued and commitment relieved to actual at GRN (A4)
